Bash(node -e "var fs=require\(''fs''\); var src=fs.readFileSync\(''data/exercises.js'',''utf8''\).replace\(/^export /gm,''''\).replace\(/^import .*/gm,''''\); try { new Function\(src\); console.log\(''Syntax OK''\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\(e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }")

Bash(node -e "var fs=require\(''fs''\); var src=fs.readFileSync\(''data/exercises.js'',''utf8''\).replace\(/^export /gm,''''\).replace\(/^import .*/gm,''''\); var fn=new Function\(src+''; return exerciseData;''\); var data=fn\(\); var nameMap={}; var total=0; for\(var k in data\){var c=data[k].exercises.length; console.log\(k+'': ''+c\); total+=c; data[k].exercises.forEach\(function\(ex\){if\(!nameMap[ex.name]\)nameMap[ex.name]=[]; nameMap[ex.name].push\(k\);}\)} console.log\(''Total: ''+total\); var dups=0; for\(var n in nameMap\){if\(nameMap[n].length>1\){console.log\(''DUPLICATE: ''+n+'' in ''+nameMap[n].join\('', ''\)\); dups++;}} if\(dups==0\) console.log\(''No duplicates found''\);")
